test_cases.title: Admin role is required to delete a project
preconditions: A member role user is logged in
steps: Navigate to the project page as a member user
Inspect available actions on the project
test_cases.expected_result: No delete option is available; the admin role is required for project deletion

test_cases.title: Confirmation dialog appears before project deletion
test_cases.expected_result: A confirmation dialog is displayed asking the admin to confirm deletion before proceeding

test_cases.title: Project is permanently deleted after admin confirms
steps: Search for the project in the project list
test_cases.expected_result: The project is deleted and no longer appears in any project listing

test_cases.title: All project tasks are removed when the project is deleted
steps: Note the task IDs belonging to the project
Attempt to retrieve the tasks by their IDs
test_cases.expected_result: All tasks associated with the deleted project are also removed from the system

test_cases.title: Project members are notified when a project is deleted
preconditions: A project with at least one member exists
steps: Delete the project with admin confirmation
Check the notification inbox of a former project member
test_cases.expected_result: Each project member receives a notification that the project has been deleted

notes: Five test cases cover all five explicitly stated requirements: role check, confirmation dialog, project deletion, task cascade, and member notification.
